name: proseforge-codex
description: Codex plugin wrapper for the HermesForgeN novel workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Two-entry Codex wrapper for Novel Forge.
interface.longDescription: Adds two focused Codex workflow entries that map to the Novel Forge pipeline and project-management flows without introducing MCP.
defaultPrompt: Use nf_pipeline to prepare or review a chapter.
Use nf_project to manage slots, outlines, and exports.
